item.title: El Niño Commodity Trade Map
item.description: El Niño Commodity Trade Map Working thesis on how an El Niño cycle ripples through crude (BNO, USO, SCO) and ags.

item.title: TQQQ Convergence Thesis
item.description: TQQQ Convergence Thesis DITM call spread convergence playbook on TQQQ. Second seed note testing auto-publish.

item.title: Knowledge
item.description: Knowledge Auto-home for the published vault. Quartz renders this as the site landing page.
